allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2500; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $bitmap.Save\("$env:TEMP\\tactical-board-screenshot.png"\); Write-Host "Saved to $env:TEMP\\tactical-board-screenshot.png")
